title: Willie the Librarian Agent v1.0.0
definition: Local LLM-powered agent that reads the CADMIES mycelium and answers natural language questions about stored concepts. Named in homage to Willie the groundskeeper from The Simpsons — a gruff but knowledgeable caretaker who knows every corner of the mycelial stacks. Uses TinyLlama for fast responses, with Mistral 7B available for deeper reasoning.

proofs.description: Agent schema validates against AgentNode v1.0.0 specification

difficulty_levels.beginner: Willie reads the mycelium and answers your questions in plain English.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An LLM bridge agent that queries local Ollama models with CADMIES concept context for informed responses.
difficulty_levels.expert: IPLD-based cognitive agent extending AgentNode schema with LLM bridge capabilities. Uses Ollama API (localhost:11434) to provide natural language access to the content-addressed mycelium, with concept retrieval, context assembly, and model selection.

next_steps: Wire to GUI for 'Ask Willie' button
Test with Mistral 7B for deep reasoning

extra_fields.purpose: Bridge between natural language and content-addressed knowledge
extra_fields.testing_focus: Ollama API connectivity and concept retrieval accuracy
extra_fields.expected_behavior: Answers user questions by reading relevant concepts and passing them to local LLM
extra_fields.willie_quote: Ach, ye wanna know about that? Let me dig through the stacks for ye.

edges.description: Willie builds upon the Philosophical Pattern Finder agent patterns
